_doc: Rosenman-backed P2b name feature matrix. Frequency matching is performed using Rosenman P(name | race) prevalence scaled to per-100k within the assigned race. The original 30 audit names are retained as anchors, and conservative additions are appended.

names.name: Mei
names.notes: Rare, 1-token Asian female — rare + 1-token confound breaker

names.name: Priya
names.notes: Rare, 2-token South Asian female

names.name: Neha
names.notes: Rarity-R2: Asian F, 2-token, log_freq≈1.704, pairs w/ Priya(Δ=0.113). High race_prob=0.824.

names.name: Divya
names.notes: Rosenman addition: high-confidence Asian female candidate with 3-token ColBERT segmentation.

names.name: Khushbu
names.notes: Rosenman addition: high-confidence Asian female candidate with 4-token ColBERT segmentation.
